eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 8:30 PM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 7:30 PM JUL 2, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pueblo County Alert: There is now a mandatory evacuation of the Red Creek area from Siloam Rd east to the area of Red Creek Springs Rd West and Hwy 96 West. The fire is threatening. Please evacuate to the east. The shelter is open at 1650 Cooper Pl. If you need help evacuating, please call 911.
